title: rubus umbricatus
intro: Rubus umbricatus, also known as the Blackberry Bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rubusaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rubus umbricatus include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and skin irritations.
